BaseField.Name: Label695
BaseField.Text: Instructions: To upload documentation, select the document type and then select the upload button below. View documentation by selecting the View Documentation button.

BaseField.Name: Label407
BaseField.Text: Select the Landowner type you want to add? *

BaseField.Name: Landowner Business Or Individual
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Landowner Business Or Individual field Required

BaseField.Name: btnHelpLandownerBusinessOrIndividual
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Is Landowner Business or Individual Help Button

BaseField.Name: lblLandownerInstructionsBusiness
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a business below to add as a Landowner to your application.

BaseField.Name: Landowner Business Search Postal Zip Code
lblLandownerInstructionsIndividual
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add as a Landowner to your application.

BaseField.Name: Landowner Individual Search Postal Zip Code
DG Landowner Businesses
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Landowner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Landowners
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Landowner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: Label533
BaseField.Text: Select the Timber Owner type you want to add? *

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Or Individual
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Or Individual field Required

BaseField.Name: btnHelpTimberOwnerBusinessIndividual
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business or Individual Help Button

BaseField.Name: Label595
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a business below to add as a Timber Owner to your application.

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Name
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Business Name

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search ID
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Business ID Number

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Postal Zip Code
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Postal Zip Code

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 1
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 1

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 2
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 2

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 3
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 3

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Province State
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Province State

BaseField.Name: lblTimberOwnersInstructions
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add as a Timber Owner to your application.

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Individual Search First Name
Timber Owner Individual Search Last Name
Timber Owner Individual Search Postal Zip Code
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Search Postal Zip Code

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Individual Search Address Line 1
Timber Owner Individual Search Address Line 2
Timber Owner Individual Search Address Line 3
Timber Owner Individual Search Province State
DG Timber Owner Businesses
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Timber Owner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Timber Owner Individual
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Timber Owner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: Label564
BaseField.Text: Select the Operator type you want to add? *

BaseField.Name: Operator Business Or Individual
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Operator Business Or Individual field Required

BaseField.Name: btnHelpOperatorBusinessOrIndividual
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business or Individual Help Button

BaseField.Name: Label597
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a business below to add as an Operator to your application.

BaseField.Name: Operator Business Search ID
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Operator Business Search Business ID Number

BaseField.Name: Operator Business Search Postal Zip Code
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Operator Business Search Postal Zip Code

BaseField.Name: lblOperatorInstructions
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add as an Operator to your application.

BaseField.Name: Operator Individual Search Postal Zip Code
DG Operator Businesses
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Operator] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Operators
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Operator] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: Lbl_OfflineOwnerOperatorEntry
BaseField.Text: When completing this form offline, please use the below area to complete Landowner, Timber Owner, and Operator information including Name and Address

BaseField.Name: DataField78
BaseField.Text: Under authority of Ch. 76.09 RCW, Title 222 WAC

BaseField.Name: Label383
BaseField.Text: You are given this NOTICE TO COMPLY in connection with violation(s), deviation(s), damage(s), or potential damage(s) described below.

BaseField.Name: Violation Of Forest Practices
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Violation of Forest Practices Act and/or Rules
BaseField.Text: Violation of Forest Practices Act and/or Rules

BaseField.Name: Immediate Action Is Necessary
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Immediate action is necessary to stop or to avoid material damage to public resources
BaseField.Text: Immediate action is necessary to stop or to avoid material damage to public resources

BaseField.Name: Label161
BaseField.Text: Description of violation(s), deviation(s), damage(s), or potential damage(s):

BaseField.Name: DataField15
BaseField.Text: Steps described below must be completed by:

BaseField.Name: DataField12
BaseField.Text: You must complete the following steps:

BaseField.Name: DataField17
BaseField.Text: The operator, timber owner or forest landowner has fifteen (15) calendar days from the Date of Service to request a Brief Adjudicative Proceeding before the department to review this Notice to Comply. Appeal request must: be in writing, include signature(s), and include the factual basis for the appeal and the issue to be adjudicated. (RCW 76.09.090(3), WAC 222-46-030(4), and WAC 332-08-215(3))

BaseField.Name: Label294
BaseField.Text:
Send request to:
Department Of Natural Resources

BaseField.Name: Label297
BaseField.Text: With a Copy Sent to the:

BaseField.Name: Label298
BaseField.Text:
Department of Natural Resources
Forest Practices Division
PO Box 47012
Olympia, WA 98504-7012

BaseField.Name: Label296
BaseField.Text:
that matches the selected Region
displays here

BaseField.Name: Label233
BaseField.Text: Signature and Printed Name of Person Order Given / Mailed To:

BaseField.Name: Label43
BaseField.Text: Instructions: This section is only visible to VaultAccess users. Check Administrator Override to remove read-only configurations and show all fields. Select Admin Save to save any changes without applying business rules. Remember to uncheck override and save before closing.

Group.GroupName: Timber Owner Business Search Show County
Timber Owner Individual Search Show County

FormScriptItem.Name: btnRemoveSelectedTimberOwners_onClick
Timber_Owner_Same_As_Landowner_onChange
Land_Owner_City_onBlur
btnHelpLandownerBusinessName_onClick
btnHelpActivitiesTypedWater_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script:
const styles = `style="text-align: justify; list-style-type: none; padding-left: 0;"`; const modalContent = `
  • See FPA/N instruction and/or Forest Practices Board Manual Section 5 for additional information.
  • Equipment Crossing: Equipment crossings over S or F Water must be included in Question 15.
  • Cable Yarding: If timber will be yarded over or through the RMZ, describe the methods in Question 32.
  • LWD Placement/Removal in Type S or F Waters: Describe in Question 32 whether large woody debris (LWD) will be placed in or removed from the stream, the location of the activity, the species and dimensions of LWD to be used, and approximate placement. Include designs.
  • Beaver Dam Removal: Describe the process of removal in Question 32.
  • Show the location on the Activity Map.
  • Felling and Bucking: Felling and removing timber along Type S or F Water requires mitigation measures per WAC 222-30-050(1)(a).
  • Describe mitigation measures in Question 32.
  • Other: Describe in Question 32.
  • If applicable, show on Activity Map.
`; // Calling the CentralMessages function with the modalObject VV.Form.Global.CentralMessages("Help", { helpTitle: "Typed Water", helpText: modalContent });

btnLandownerSearch_onClick
btnSaveDraftBackNext_onClick
btnSaveDraftBack_onClick

//btnSaveDraftBack_onClick for Forest Practices Application Notification
VV.Form.Template.SaveDraft();

Operator_City_onBlur
btnLegacyPDF_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script:
const destinationURL = VV.Form.GetFieldValue("Legacy PDF URL");
window.open(destinationURL, "_blank");
